meta.title: Arsenal 2-1 Wolves (13 Dec, 2025) Commentary - ESPN (UK)
meta.description: Play-by-play action for the Arsenal vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers English Premier League game from 13 December 2025 on ESPN (UK).

articles.headline: Is Eddie Howe under pressure at Newcastle?
articles.description: Mark Ogden debates the future of Eddie Howe after Newcastle's 1-0 loss to Sunderland in the Premier League.

images.alt: Is Eddie Howe under pressure at Newcastle?

articles.headline: Should Thomas Frank be blamed for Tottenham's form this season?
articles.description: Mark Ogden and Steve Nicol react to Tottenham's 3-0 loss to Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

images.alt: Should Thomas Frank be blamed for Tottenham's form this season?

articles.headline: Are Aston Villa legitimate Premier League title contenders?
articles.description: Steve Nicol assesses Aston Villa's Premier League title hopes after their comeback win vs. West Ham.

images.alt: Are Aston Villa legitimate Premier League title contenders?

vids.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta believes his side must "learn" from their narrow victory over Wolverhampton Wanderers.
vids.headline: Mikel Arteta: We must learn from victory vs. Wolves

track.trackName: COM_SOC Analysis (Mikel Arteta: We must learn from victory vs. Wolves ) GLOBAL 2025-12-14

vids.description: Steve Nicol speaks about Mohamed Salah clapping the Liverpool fans after their win over Brighton.
vids.headline: Nicol: Salah didn't look like he was saying goodbye to Liverpool fans

track.trackName: COM_SOC Analysis (Nicol: Salah didn’t look like he was saying goodbye to Liverpool fans) 2025/12/13 GLOBAL

vids.description: Craig Burley reacts to Arsenal's 2-1 win over Wolves in the Premier League.
vids.headline: Burley: Arsenal got lucky in 2-1 win vs. Wolves

track.trackName: COM_SOC Analysis (Burley: Arsenal got lucky in 2-1 win vs. Wolves) 2025/12/13 GLOBAL
